caption: A bald man with a medium complexion, wearing a white collared shirt and a dark blazer, speaks while gesturing with his hands in a professional indoor setting. In the background, several people are blurred, including individuals in casual attire like a grey jacket and a green shirt. A lower-third graphic overlays the bottom of the scene, featuring a blue cube logo and the text "SANJEEV MOHAN" in bold, followed by "Principal, SanjMo | @SanjMo". To the left, it says "theCUBE" and "From the Javits Center, New York, NY", while the right side states "Sponsored By" above a "MongoDB" logo. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, shifting his facial expressions and moving his hands from an open-palm gesture toward a more closed position. The background remains consistent, though the blurred figures move slightly, and the on-screen text remains static.
